# external/ — C++ libraries and bindings

This folder contains all 23+ C++ libraries integrated into Dear ImGui Bundle, each as a git submodule with auto-generated Python bindings.

**Categories:**
- **Core:** imgui, hello_imgui, immapp
- **Plotting:** implot, implot3d, immvision, imgui_tex_inspect
- **Text:** ImGuiColorTextEdit, imgui_md
- **Tools:** ImGuizmo, imgui-node-editor, nanovg, imgui_explorer
- **Widgets:** ImFileDialog, imgui-knobs, imspinner, imgui_toggle, ImCoolBar, imgui-command-palette, ImAnim
- **Support:** glfw, fplus (no Python bindings)

**Binding generation:** see `bindings_generation/` and the [bindings documentation](../docs/book/devel_docs/bindings_intro.md).

**Full structure:** see [Repository Structure](../docs/book/devel_docs/structure.md).
